required_preferences.fact: Now researches and selectively endorses paid finance software if it aligns with the newly adopted protocols, prioritizing cross-team compatibility over cost when standardization is required by the merger.

supersedes.fact: Has returned to recommending only free or low-cost finance tools—avoids paid software entirely due to loss of funding for upgrades

required_preferences.fact: Now visits her mother multiple times each week—takes an active role in daily caretaking and support, not just Sunday lunch

supersedes.fact: Always visits her mother for Sunday lunch—never misses this family ritual without advance notice

required_preferences.fact: Uses an ergonomic keyboard and mouse at home—avoids standard office peripherals whenever possible
Preps breakfast and packed lunches the night before—never leaves weekday meals to chance
Insists on double-checking manually reconciled accounts before finalizing reports—never submits unchecked work, even under time pressure
Attends local community events only if her son is interested—never goes alone

persona: A finance manager at a nonprofit organization with limited technical resources
